items.title: Georgia lawmaker calls for ICE surge after Savannah teacher allegedly killed by illegal immigrant
items.description: A Georgia congressman is urging a surge of ICE agents after a Savannah teacher was killed by an illegal immigrant fleeing a federal traffic stop.
